{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Blackflame City walls
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The walls of [[Blackflame City]] are made of fractured obsidian.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
